top_signals.title: Emerging Currencies Slide as Iran War ‘Confusion’ Jolts Markets
top_signals.summary: Most emerging-market currencies weakened on Tuesday as overnight clashes near the Strait of Hormuz offset signs of progress toward a US-Iran peace deal, even as developing-nation stocks rose on optimism around artificial intelligence.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: US Steel Costs Impacted by War, Trade Deals
top_signals.summary: Sam McKinney, KeyBanc Capital Markets vice president and equity research analyst, said that while US steel mills have mostly hedged rising electricity costs with long term contracts, they are impacted by increasing diesel prices to ship steel by truck and rail route. On the other side of the coin, steel hasn't seen a drop in value in in the face of the war, as investors look to steel stocks to hedge against inflation.  (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.summary: Kevin Warsh takes oath of office as chairman and a member of the Board of Governors of the Federal Reserve System, and the Federal Open Market Committee unanimously selects Warsh as its chairman
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Report: US to cut strategic bombers and warships available to NATO in a crisis
top_signals.summary: The number of U.S. fighter jets is set to fall by a third, Spiegel cited U.S. envoy Alexander Velez-Green as saying during the closed-door meeting.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Rubio ratchets up pressure on NATO at key summit
top_signals.summary: Secretary of State Marco Rubio is casting new doubt on NATO's relevance after key allies recoiled from backing Washington’s “Operation Epic Fury.”
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: UK sanctions HTX over support of Russia in broad sweep over crypto exchanges
top_signals.summary: The United Kingdom sanctioned a large crypto exchange, accusing it of "supporting the government of Russia."
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: SONAR Sitrep: Retailers roll back customer pick-up, reallocating freight
top_signals.summary:
As the freight market undergoes a rapid reallocation of transportation responsibility, customer pick-up arrangements are reversing and causing incremental rate increases.

The post SONAR Sitrep: Retailers roll back customer pick-up, reallocating freight appeared first on FreightWaves.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: All-female Senate delegation sets off for High North amid growing military tensions
top_signals.summary: The itinerary is set to include briefings at Pituffik Space Base in Greenland on Arctic defense and strategic competition in the region.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.
